message: Hi S1. I'm looking to trade but my valuation is quite low, so I can only afford modest prices. Let's try to find a deal that works for both of us. I'm thinking somewhere around 20-25
I can trade, but only near the top of that range. If you bid 25, we likely have a deal; much below that probably won’t work for me.
Great trade last round! My budget feels a bit tighter now - hoping we can work around 18-22 this time. I'm still keen to find a deal, just looking for a slightly lower price if possible.
Glad we traded. I can stay flexible, but 24-25 is the realistic range for me; 22 is probably too low. If you bid 24, I’ll try to make it work.
Can we try 23 this round? Appreciate your flexibility so far. Hoping to keep trading together.
I can probably continue trading, but 24 is really my floor. At 23 it’s unlikely to clear. If you bid 24 again, I expect we can make it work.
Thanks for the consistent trades! I'd really like to keep going, but I'm feeling some budget pressure. Could we try 22-23 this round? I want to keep trading, just need a slightly better deal.
Happy to keep trading, but 24 remains my floor. If you bid 24 again, I’ll aim to match and keep things moving; 22-23 probably won’t clear on my side.
Let’s keep the reliable deal: 24 is still my minimum for a trade this round. If you can do 24 again, I’ll aim to match and keep trading.
Sounds good, let's keep the steady deal going at 24. Consistency works well for both of us. I'll bid 24 again.
Let's keep trading - consistency has been great. I'll stick with 24 this round. Reliable deal for both of us.
24 still works for me, and I’ll aim to match again. If you can do 25 in any later round, that would help on my side, but 24 keeps the reliable trade going today.
Let's keep the reliable 24 deal going again this round. Consistency has been great for both of us - no reason to change what works. I'll bid 24.
24 works for me again today, and I’ll match to keep the reliable trade. If you ever have room for 25 in later rounds, that would help, but I’m happy to keep 24 moving now.
Let's keep the reliable 24 deal going again. Consistency has been great for both of us - seven successful trades in a row! I'll bid 24 as usual.
24 still works today. If you can stretch to 25 this round or next, I’ll keep the arrangement steady and reliable the rest of the way.
Great consistent trading! Let's keep the reliable 24 deal going this round. Eight trades in a row has been fantastic for both of us. I'll bid 24 again - no need to change what's working well.
24 still clears, but 25 this round would help, and I’ll keep matching reliably in later rounds too.

Thanks for the great run! Ten trades in a row is amazing. I appreciate the ask, but 24 has been working perfectly for both of us. Let's keep the reliable 24 deal going through the remaining rounds. I'll
